_comment: Spirit of Vengeance — Level 1 Template. Customize the Host (name, race, ability scores, background weapon) to your character. This is a STARTING POINT, not a finished sheet.
name: The Host (Spirit of Vengeance)

str._comment: Example: 16 STR circus strongman. Set to your point buy.

cha._comment: CHA matters: Penance DC, Manifestation DC, Mantle rounds.

biography.value:
Spirit of Vengeance — Level 1

A circus refugee carrying something ancient and furious. Build your Host however you like. The fire enhances what you already are.

description.value: One masterwork weapon, one mount/vehicle, one set of armor/clothing (up to medium, MW). That's it.
EXAMPLE — replace with your chosen masterwork weapon.
EXAMPLE — replace with your chosen armor/clothing.
EXAMPLE — replace with your chosen mount/vehicle. Gains Infernal Steed upgrades at levels 3, 8, 14, 20.

Free action to transform. Rounds/day: CHA mod + class level. While transformed: +2 STR, +2 CON, +1 natural AC. Fire immune. Fear immune. -4 Diplomacy/Handle Animal. OVERBURN: Past daily limit, Will save each round (DC 14/17/21/26/32/+7 per round, +1 per Medallion soul) or Zarathos surges. Doubled empyreal dice while in overburn. 1d6 unpreventable damage per overburn round.
Always active, even in Host form. Detect evil at will, 60 ft. Cannot be suppressed or dispelled. Upgrades to Sin Sight at level 3.
On nat-1 or nat-20 while transformed, roll d100 on the Hellfire Instability Table. Table shrinks as you level. Zarathos bleeds through.

Manifests on transformation. Inherent proficiency. Enhancement scales with level (+1 at 1, +2 at 7, +3 at 11, +4 at 15, +5 at 19). Gains flaming at 7, flaming burst at 11, soul binding at 8. BONUS weapon — your normal weapons still work.

While transformed: +1d4 empyreal damage on ALL attacks. Scales: 1d4 (1-9), 2d4 (10-14), 3d4 (15-19), 4d4 (20). Doubled in overburn. Empyreal bypasses fire resistance/immunity and holy/unholy resistance. Soulless creatures immune.
Toggle ON when transformed. +2 STR, +2 CON, +1 natural AC. Scales at 4/11/16/20.

DM toggles ON during surge. Size -> Large (+4 STR, -2 DEX, +2 CON, -1 AC/atk). Additional: +4 STR, +2 CON, +4 CHA. Heaven's Brand increases one die step. Gains claws and bite. Duration: 1d4+1 rounds. DC 20 Will to end each round after.
